tags.name: commGatewayAuths
tags.description: CommGatewayAuth records stored in Unigate. List/create/update/delete is proxied through OMS UnigateServices.

tags.name: productStoreEmailSettings
tags.description: Per-product-store email notification configurations. Links emailType + productStore to a CommGatewayAuth.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page number to return, starting with zero

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 100)

parameters.name: orderByField
parameters.description: Field name to order by (or comma separated names)

parameters.name: pageNoLimit
parameters.description: If true don't limit page size (no pagination)

parameters.name: dependentLevels
parameters.description: Levels of dependent child records to include

parameters.name: primaryProductCategoryId
parameters.description: The primary category ; it should be one of the productCategoryId already setup in ProductCategoryMember

parameters.name: quantityIncluded
parameters.description: If you have a six-pack of 12oz soda cans you would have quantityIncluded=12, quantityUomId=oz, piecesIncluded=6.

parameters.name: fixedAmount
parameters.description: Use this for products which are sold in fixed denominations, such as gift certificates or calling cards.

parameters.name: shippingWeight
parameters.description: The shipping weight of the product.

parameters.name: virtualVariantMethodEnum
parameters.description: This field defines the method of selecting a variant from the selectable features on the virtual product. Either as a variant explosion which will work to about 200 variants or as feature explosion which almost has no limits

parameters.name: reservMaxPersons
parameters.description: maximum number of persons who can rent this asset at the same time

parameters.name: reserv2ndPPPerc
parameters.description: percentage of the end price for the 2nd person renting this asset connected to this product

parameters.name: reservNthPPPerc
parameters.description: percentage of the end price for the Nth person renting this asset connected to this product

parameters.name: configId
parameters.description: Used to safe the persisted configuration Id for AGGREGATED products.

parameters.name: lotIdFilledIn
parameters.description: Indicate if the lotId must be informed

parameters.name: orderDecimalQuantity
parameters.description: use to indicate if decimal quantity can be ordered for this product. Default value is Y

parameters.name: productUrlName
parameters.description: Product name to be used in URL on store front

parameters.name: xSmallImageUrl
parameters.description: Extra small image URL for product

parameters.name: thumbnailImageUrl
parameters.description: Thumbnail image URL for product

parameters.name: alwaysNewLineItem
parameters.description: If Y then the product will be added in the cart as a new line item even if it is already present in the cart.

parameters.name: isInstallationProduct
parameters.description: Set Y if product is installable.

parameters.name: requireInspection
parameters.description: Set Y if product require inspection.By default product requires inspection

parameters.name: lastIndexedDateTime
parameters.description: Last date time when the product get indexed

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page number to return, starting with zero

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 100)

parameters.name: orderByField
parameters.description: Field name to order by (or comma separated names)

parameters.name: pageNoLimit
parameters.description: If true don't limit page size (no pagination)

parameters.name: dependentLevels

get.description: Running tally of a product's average cost in a particular company and facility

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page number to return, starting with zero

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page number to return, starting with zero

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (default 100)

parameters.name: orderByField
parameters.description: Field name to order by (or comma separated names)

parameters.name: pageNoLimit
parameters.description: If true don't limit page size (no pagination)

parameters.name: dependentLevels
parameters.description: Levels of dependent child records to include

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Shopify Product ID (used for both virtual and variant products)

parameters.name: assocs
parameters.description:
For virtual products, a comma-separated list of associated variant product Shopify IDs.
                For variant products, it will be empty.

parameters.name: parentProductId
parameters.description:
The Shopify Product ID of the parent product for variant products. For virtual products, it will be empty.
                It's kept separate from assocs to store the virtual product id as a String.

parameters.name: features
parameters.description: A List of selected options or features of the product (e.g., 1/Size/S, 1/Size/M, 1/Color/Red).

parameters.name: identifications
parameters.description: A map of identifying attributes such as 'id', 'sku', and 'barcode'.

parameters.name: metafields
parameters.description: Flattened metafield entries in the format "key/namespace/value", stored as a list.

parameters.name: productHash
parameters.description: SHA256 Hash representing the product’s core details (title, handle, image, gift card, etc.).

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Categorization or label tags of the product, flattened as key/value strings.

parameters.name: differenceMap
parameters.description:
A complete diff of the product’s changed fields including tags, features, metafields, assocs, identifications,
                and nested differences in associated variants. Stored as JSON.
